description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, codequality, and security. In the build stage add a job named build that uses the ruby:2.6 image, runs gem install bundler --no-document then bundle update, and stores Gemfile.lock as an artifact. In the codequality stage add a rubocop job that also uses ruby:2.6, runs gem install rubocop rubocop-performance --no-document followed by rubocop. In the security stage add a dependency_scanning job that uses the docker:stable image with the docker:stable-dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2, runs export SP_VERSION=$(echo '$CI_SERVER_VERSION' | sed 's/^\([0-9]*\)\.\([0-9]*\).*/\1-\2-stable/') and then docker run --env DEP_SCAN_DISABLE_REMOTE_CHECKS='${DEP_SCAN_DISABLE_REMOTE_CHECKS:-false}' --volume '$PWD:/code' --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock 'registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/security-products/dependency-scanning:$SP_VERSION' /code, and publishes gl-dependency-scanning-report.json as an artifact, depending on the build job.
